Setlist
DMBlive Series Release Info Grid
This info grid is of release information for DMBlive.

The DMBlive series ran from the end of 2008 to mid-2017. The shows were not released with volume numbers at the time, but later DMB added volume numbers to their website. These volume numbers were online for several years, but have since been removed. We have tracked these releases by their volume that came from that page as several times multiple DMBlive shows were released together. Retaining the volume numbers in our website helps keep them organized and consistent.

The art style changed after the Volume 22 release from a simple date / venue black cover with colored shapes to a photo of a Digital Audio Tape with a background tinted with color. The first 22 volumes' cover art was updated to match new format including the select color overlay. There is one exception where the colors applied to Volumes 11 and 12 had their colors swapped when their cover arts were updated. The left background color represents the current art, the right background color and hex code represent the original. These two volumes intentionally do not match colors left-to-right. Starting with Volume 23, the colors represent the new art only.

Rel. to Rel. = Release Date to Release Date. How many days between DMBlive releases. Because volume numbers were not assigned at the time of release, when multiple shows were released together, we have populated both releases with days since the previous wave unlike our Live Trax Release Info Grid.
Link Release Show Date Show Type Venue & Location Release Date Rel. to Rel. Length Digital Vinyl Original Hex
